results.question: Welches war die punkteschlechteste Falken-Saison der letzten 10 Jahre?

results.question: In welcher Saison war die Hauptrunde am kürzesten (wegen Corona)?

results.question: Welcher Trainer hatte die längste Amtszeit bei den Falken?

results.sql: SELECT c.name, ct.role, ct.start_date, ct.end_date, (ct.end_date - ct.start_date) AS tenure_days FROM coach_tenures ct JOIN coaches c ON c.id = ct.coach_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = ct.team_id WHERE t.name = 'Heilbronner Falken' AND ct.role = 'Headcoach' AND ct.end_date IS NOT NULL AND ct.start_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tenure_days DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1;
